name: human-like-memory
description: HumanLike Memory / Human-Like Memory OpenClaw skill for long-term memory recall, memory search, memory save, and conversation continuity across sessions.
notes: This OpenClaw adapter is a thin wrapper over the shared core runtime.
Configuration is expected through OpenClaw config or injected environment variables.
For legacy OpenClaw compatibility, set HUMAN_LIKE_MEM_SCENARIO=openclaw-plugin explicitly.
